name: Baldur’s Gate
summary: A crowded, suspicious and ambitious city on the Chionthar, split between wealth, desperation and ruthless opportunity.
politics: The Council of Four and Flaming Fist maintain order through influence and force.
Patriars, merchants, criminals and cults all compete beneath the surface.
culture: Hard-edged, commercial and wary; everyone is selling something or hiding something.
District identity matters, especially between the Upper City, Lower City and Outer City.
